name: Basler Mehlsuppe
recipeIngredient: 95 g grated Gruyère (or other hard cheese)
recipeInstructions:
- Peel onions, finely chop or dice
- Flour in a French oven pan, bake slowly
- Let cool
Cooking
- Brown onions in plant-based fat slowly
- Dust with roasted flour and mix
- Allow to cool slightly
- Enrich with hot broth, stir well
- Bring to a boil, add red wine, skim and simmer for at least 1 hour
- Strain the soup
- Season to taste
- Serve grated Gruyère separately
